page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8ise.8xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 architecture, utilizing the Intel Xeon 8475B processor running at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz. With a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, each of the 32 vCPUs maps directly to a dedicated physical core, eliminating resource contention from hyperthreading.

The instance is equipped with 128.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, meaning storage requirements must be met via network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 20 Gbps, and the instance does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

This hardware profile is designed for workloads requiring dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading overhead, balanced memory allocation, and high network throughput. Suitable use cases include general-purpose application servers, web serving, and containerized microservices that benefit from predictable CPU performance and a 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8ise.8xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance built on the KVM hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 architecture, utilizing Intel Xeon 8475B processors running at 2.7 GHz. Because the instance operates with 1.0 thread per core, it provides 32 dedicated vCPUs without hyperthreading, ensuring predictable compute performance. The system is configured with 128.0 GB of RAM, establishing a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. It contains no local storage or GPUs, relying entirely on network-attached storage options. Network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 20 Gbps. This instance is designed for workloads requiring dedicated CPU allocation and balanced memory, such as web serving, application hosting, and general-purpose enterprise workloads. It offers a stable, non-shared resource profile for applications that demand consistent processing power.
